best_individual: add(step_penalty_adder(distance, 0.906, step_penalty_adder(distance, if_then_else(is_water, distance, 0.76), if_then_else(is_water, distance, 0.782))), steepness)

hall_of_fame.individual: add(step_penalty_adder(distance, 0.906, step_penalty_adder(distance, if_then_else(is_water, distance, 0.76), if_then_else(is_water, distance, 0.782))), steepness)
add(step_penalty_adder(distance, 0.906, step_penalty_adder(distance, steepness, if_then_else(is_water, distance, 0.782))), steepness)
add(step_penalty_adder(distance, 0.906, step_penalty_adder(distance, mul(distance, if_then_else(is_water, distance, 0.76)), if_then_else(is_water, distance, 0.782))), steepness)
add(step_penalty_adder(distance, 0.906, step_penalty_adder(distance, mul(distance, distance), if_then_else(is_water, distance, 0.782))), steepness)
add(step_penalty_adder(distance, 0.906, step_penalty_adder(distance, mul(step_penalty_multiplier(0.377, steepness, distance), distance), if_then_else(is_water, distance, 0.782))), steepness)
